'''Palpatine II''' was an editor and main broadcaster of the [[Galactic Weekly NewsStack]]. Not much was known about this individual except that traces had led [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Commission for the Preservation of the New Order/Legends|COMPNOR]] investigators to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
